mnemonics.title: Sobel Directions
mnemonics.content: Horizontal Sobel: Horizontal Emphasis (HHE) - Horizontal has Horizontal Emphasis. Vertical Sobel: Vertical Values Vanished (VVV) - Vertical has Vertical Values.

mnemonics.title: Filter Applications
mnemonics.content: MGM: Mean for General noise, Gaussian for Moderate edge preservation, Median for impulse noise
